scope: legacy-parity read streams only (assets, live streams, direct uploads, system signing keys); the full Mux surface (playback restrictions, transcription, DRM, webhooks, video views/errors data, spaces, etc.) is out of scope until Pass B

excluded.reason: /video/v1/assets is a mutation endpoint; this bundle has no reviewed write record schema, approval risk, or legacy write contract for that operation
/video/v1/assets/{ASSET_ID} is a destructive/admin mutation and is not exposed as a reverse-ETL action in this bundle
/video/v1/live-streams is a mutation endpoint; this bundle has no reviewed write record schema, approval risk, or legacy write contract for that operation
/data/v1/video-views is an additional documented read resource not implemented by legacy; this bundle does not declare its stream schema, pagination contract, or fixtures
/data/v1/errors is an additional documented read resource not implemented by legacy; this bundle does not declare its stream schema, pagination contract, or fixtures
/system/v1/signing-keys is a mutation endpoint; this bundle has no reviewed write record schema, approval risk, or legacy write contract for that operation
